codeReview.summary: Current HEAD still satisfies the feature contract: the frontend contract harness resolves scripts from the active repo root, invokes them through `/usr/bin/env bash`, and keeps the coins-script assertion aligned with the current fixture-envelope behavior so the harness is no longer blocked by `spawn bash ENOENT` or stale checkout paths.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the feature metadata, worker transcript skeleton, handoff, commit `88468b5`, and current harness/script files. The change remains narrowly scoped, matches the regression-gate skill procedure, and the current branch still preserves the intended portable shell-launch behavior without introducing new review findings.
